name: ai-healthcare-prediction-system
description: AI Healthcare Prediction System - Full Stack

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev:both: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.deploy:both: npm run build:all && echo 'Ready for Vercel deployment'
